root.sql: select (case when data_balance <= 100000 then 1 when data_balance between 100001 and 200000 then 2 when data_balance between 200001 and 300000 then 3 when data_balance between 300001 and 400000 then 4 when data_balance between 400001 and 500000 then 5 when data_balance between 500001 and 600000 then 6 when data_balance between 600001 and 700000 then 7 when data_balance between 700001 and 800000 then 8 when data_balance between 800001 and 900000 then 9 when data_balance between 900001 and 1000000 then 10 when data_balance between 1000001 and 5000000 then 11 when data_balance between 5000001 and 10000000 then 12 when data_balance > 10000000 then 13 end ) as share_range , data_balance , membership_no , confirm_date , sysdate from sc_cls_confirm_data where data_group = 'SHR' and data_balance > '0' --and confirm_date = '30/05/2023' /*WHERE*/
